title: Lite Bite Foods International Enterprises is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Lite Bite Foods International Enterprises is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Lite Bite Foods International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Kolkata. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Lite Bite Foods International Enterprises:
Lite Bite Foods International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lite Bite Foods International Enterprises!
